{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/heads/master/assets/cubyz/tools/pickaxe.png
}}
The Pickaxe is a tool crafted at the [[Workbench]]. It can be used to break any <b>mineable</b> block, such as stones, metals, gems, or glass.


== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

[[Category:Tools]]
